posts.content: Huge turnouts expected for political rallies in Beldaur assembly constituency. Development issues are taking center stage! #Beldaur #BiharElections2025
How is the candidate ground outreach in Beldaur? Hearing that the MGNREGA work distribution and local water issues will decide the swing voters here.
Public Opinion in Beldaur: Ground survey of what rural voters want from the next MLA.
